title: One More
lyrics:
[verse 1]
I just saved the whole darn town!
My socks are still on the ground.
The pups need me—don’t you see?
One more episode, pleeease!

[chorus]
One more! One more!
Turn it back, don’t ignore!
One more! One more!
I’m not done—hit restore!

[verse 2]
I’ll miss the villain’s big attack!
My snack’s still half in the crack.
The credits roll? That’s just cold!
I’ll freeze the screen—just watch me hold!

[chorus]
One more! One more!
Turn it back, don’t ignore!
One more! One more!
I’m not done—hit restore!

[ending]
Okay, fine… I’ll close my eyes…
But just one dream—*one* more prize!
style_prompt: Catchy children's song, ukulele and cajón, 112 BPM, strong bass, punchy beat, bouncy groovy infectious singalong, impossible to sit still, makes you move
scene: The living room’s blue couch is still warm from your body when Dad turns off the TV after *Paw Patrol* ends at 4:17 PM, his thumb lingering on the remote. You kick the blanket tangled around your ankles and shout, "One more!"—your voice cracking like the last chip in the bag on the coffee table.
cover_description: A kid in pajamas clings to the TV remote like it’s a superhero cape, legs kicking mid-air as the screen flickers "ONE MORE EPISODE?" in bright neon letters.
